global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting ClearLedger with a focus on transparency in financial services.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of a circle and a rectangle in a light blue color, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A larger rectangle in a light blue color, also centered, overlapping with the other shapes.

elements.label: main message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your money, clearer' with a smaller line below it saying 'No hidden fees', centered at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer No hidden fees

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'ClearLedger' in white, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Get offer' at the bottom center of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
